top_signals.title: Ukrainian strike on college in Russian-occupied town kills 18: officialsUkraine’s capital Kyiv hit by massive missile, drone attack
top_signals.summary: Kyiv was hit by ⁠a massive strike of missiles and drones early on Sunday, shortly after its air force warned Russia might launch a hypersonic Oreshnik ballistic missile.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US oil producers increase output to capture price surge from Iran war
top_signals.summary: Drilling expansion follows 40 per cent jump in cost from global supply crunch that has dented president’s approval ratings
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
